name: Sundae Brownie Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Generously prick the bottom and sides of the pie crust with a fork. Bake the crust for 10 minutes; remove from the oven.
3. In a large bowl, beat the eggs. Stir in the sugar and melted butter.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together flour, cocoa, and salt. Add this mixture to the egg mixture.
5. Stir in vanilla extract, Hershey's Semi-sweet chips, Reese's Peanut Butter Chips, and chopped nuts.
6. Pour the batter into the pie crust; return to the oven.
7. Bake for an additional 25 to 30 minutes, or until almost set (the center will not be fully cooked).
8. Serve warm or at room temperature with ice cream. Drizzle with Hershey's Chocolate Topping.
9. Garnish with Hershey's Kisses Milk Choc.
